name: Swing 365 Golf-GR
address: 5751 Byron Center Ave SW Suite L, Wyoming, MI 49519
about: Swing 365 Golf Grand Rapids provides a state-of-the-art indoor golf experience utilizing Full Swing simulator technology. The venue operates on a membership-based model, offering 24/7/365 access to individual suites that allow golfers to play and practice at their convenience. This private club atmosphere is designed to be warm and inviting, catering to those looking for a personalized and accessible golfing experience year-round regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Private suites for individual or group play
Official TPC Network courses available via Full Swing
Membership-based model ensures tee time availability

simulator_hardware.notes: Trusted by TGL and Tour pros worldwide

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, most private simulator facilities allow you to bring your own clubs. You can contact the venue directly to confirm if rental clubs are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify food and drink policies for the private suites. As a private club facility, it is best to inquire directly about outside food and beverage policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On a simulator, an 18-hole round typically takes between 45 minutes to an hour per player, depending on the skill level and game mode selected.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, indoor golf simulators are generally family-friendly and provide a safe environment for juniors to learn and play the game.
